channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McCallum wins all-around as Red Rocks beat Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Grace McCallum won the all-around with a score of 39.65 to lead the 4th-ranked Utah gymnastics team past #19 Arizona, 197.675 to 196.125.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The Suns' Big 3 is still together after the trade deadline, so the search for success continues
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant, Devin Booker and Bradley Beal are still members of the Phoenix Suns after a tumultuous trade deadline. Now they have roughly 30 games to turn around their disappointing season. The problem is there aren't many reasons to believe that's going to happen.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Thomas Detry nearly aces 16, shoots 64 to take 2-shot lead in Phoenix Open
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Thomas Detry nearly aced the par-3 16th hole and shot a 7-under 64 in the second round to take a two-shot lead lead in the Phoenix Open on Friday. Detry had eight birdies and a bogey to reach 12 under on another day of perfect conditions at TPC Scottsdale.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Puka Nacua 'hoping for the best' after Cooper Kupp said Rams will try to trade him
item.description: The end of an era for the Los Angeles Rams seems to be nearing, and Puka Nacua praised Cooper Kupp in recently speaking with Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl prices are down this year. StubHub explains why
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — If you’re still planning to attend the Super Bowl on Sunday, you can expect a price drop compared to last year. The entry-level price for a ticket is currently around $2,600 according to StubHub.
item.dc:creator: JOHN CARUCCI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NASCAR honors 'The Ironman' Ricky Rudd and 'Cousin Carl' Edwards as Hall of Fame inductees
item.description: One of the toughest drivers in NASCAR history joined one the most enigmatic drivers of the modern era as the newest inductees into the Hall of Fame in a star-studded Friday night ceremony.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Cowboys star Dez Bryant rips team's 'stupid decisions,' doesn't expect success any time soon
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys missed the playoffs this season and have moved on to a new head coach. Dez Bryant thinks they've been making "stupid decisions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bakersfield sports bars prepare for America's biggest football game
item.description: It's almost time for America's biggest game and local sports bars are preparing to serve you and yours on their biggest day of the year. Here's a look at Super Bowl 59 coming this Sunday to a big screen near you.
item.dc:creator: Rob Hagan, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman is accused of stealing from a TV reporter found dead at his hotel before the Super Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Police are investigating the death of a television reporter who was in New Orleans to cover the Super Bowl and on Friday announced the arrest of a woman they say used his credit card.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ben Simmons no longer with the Nets as the sides work toward a buyout
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ben Simmons' time with the Brooklyn Nets appears to be over. The No. 1 pick in the 2016 draft was not with the Nets for their game Friday night against the Miami Heat as the sides work toward a buyout of his contract.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Walz's home state joins California in ignoring Trump's executive order to ban transgenders from girls sports
item.description: Minnesota's governing body for high school sports says it will continue to allow transgender athletes to compete in prep athletics despite President Trump's executive order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dolphins' Tyreek Hill says he wants to stay in Miami and regrets comments made after season finale
item.description: Tyreek Hill wants to stay in Miami and he regrets his comments after the Dolphins' final game of the season that suggested he wanted out.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Matthew Stafford's wife sounds off on Rams amid speculation about quarterback's future, Cooper Kupp trade news
item.description: Kelly Stafford, the wife of Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford, says their family is open to the idea of relocating amid offseason drama involving the veteran's future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UMass will pay student who made half-court shot $10,000 even though his foot was on line
item.description: A UMass student who made a half-court shot during a women’s basketball game halftime promotion will get his $10,000 prize from the school itself.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy Golen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge grants release for ex-49er Dana Stubblefield
item.description: The former NFL star is expected to be freed after being processed at Corcoran State Prison; his 2020 rape conviction was reversed in December.
item.dc:creator: Robert Salonga, The Mercury News

item.title: Saints legend Drew Brees among many praising increased safety measures at Super Bowl LIX
item.description: At Super Bowl LIX, safety is a major priority, especially considering the tragic terror attack on Bourbon Street last month. NFL players, current and former, explained how they feel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Super Bowl unicorn: Unlikely hot novelty item
item.description: You might think the hottest seller in New Orleans for the Super Bowl would be a jersey, hat, or official gameday program
item.dc:creator: Austin Kellerman, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fairfield's Deon Perry nails incredible 70-foot game-winning shot to beat rival Marist
item.description: Fairfield Stags' guard Deon Perry nailed a 70-foot game winning shot to beat Marist 59-56 on Thursday night at Fairfield University's Leo D. Mahoney Arena.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BREAKING: Junior Hockey League expansion team coming to Grand Junction 2025
item.description: Starting this fall, the action and excitement of the National Collegiate Development Conference, the highest level of the United States Premiere Hockey League, a Tier II junior hockey league, will be in Grand Junction at River City Sportplex.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Sports reporter dies while in New Orleans for Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Adan Manzano died on Wednesday in New Orleans while on assignment to cover the Super Bowl for both Telemundo Kansas City and Tico Sports.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: McDavid makes perfect pass in overtime as the Oilers beat the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor McDavid set up Zach Hyman in overtime, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Wednesday night. Hyman redirected McDavid's pass for the power-play goal at 1:36. It was Hyman's 19th goal and McDavid's 49th assist of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Several student-athletes lock in colleges on first NSD of 2025
item.description: Sean Lewis made it clear he wanted to put a fence around San Diego in the recruiting world. He proved it in the high school realm by bringing in 2024 Iron Hog winner Jett Thomas of La Jolla.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Local football player overcomes hardships, signs to play Division I football
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Mental toughness isn't something you're born with; it's a learned skill. One that Calvary Christian senior Nelson Sparrow Jr. has already mastered. "It feels great," he said. "I dreamt of this. I worked hard for this every single day of my life.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Artist explains how New Orleans childhood inspired Super Bowl logo
item.description: Months before the Chiefs and Eagles earned a ticket to Super Bowl LIX, the NFL design team asked Tajh to create both theme art and the logo for Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: Amy Russo, NewsNation

item.title: Jeremiah Trotter Jr. continues legacy of Eagles Super Bowl linebackers
item.description: His dad, known as the "Ax Man" for his signature sack celebration, played eight seasons in Midnight Green and is a member of the team's Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Matt Nagy offers advice for Ben Johnson, prepares for 2nd matchup against Vic Fangio in the Big Game
item.description: Matt Nagy, Kansas City Chiefs offensive coordinator, shared advice for the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, emphasizing the importance of winning and beating the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Tri City Christian 49, Army Navy 37
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Great game on Monday night in Vista with Tri City Christian hosting Army Navy. All tied up at 21 at halftime, the Eagles pulled off and won 49-37. Lead by Caleb Williams who hit for 14. Army Navy was lead by Yanler Ramos, he also poured in 14.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: How GJ's Andrew Henderson became the Tigers' hero on Friday
item.description: “One of the coolest moments of my high school career," said Andrew Henderson smiling from ear to ear as he reflected on the shot of his life.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz lose heartbreaker to Indiana, 112-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz could not hold a 12-point lead in the final six minutes, and lose to the Indiana Pacers Monday night at the Delta Center, 112-111.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jey Uso set to headline WrestleMania Vegas as outrage over Royal Rumble divides fans
item.description: Jey Uso won the 2025 over-the-top-rope battle royal, featuring 30 wrestlers in what may have been one of the most stacked Royal Rumble matches ever.
item.dc:creator: Tor Smith, NewsNation
